what_was_done: Deep comparison of 5 chainovi blockchain projects (TRv1, TRv1-clean, agave, eclipse-agave, trv1-chain). Identified eclipse-agave gaps: dead EIP-1559, no governance/treasury withdrawal/dev rewards program. All share same economics.
known_issues: trv1-chain remote URL contains plaintext GitHub token — rotate ASAP
eclipse-agave EIP-1559 is dead code (CU tracking TODO stub, fees never adjust)
eclipse-agave treasury is one-way valve — no withdrawal mechanism
eclipse-agave governance is a 4-line stub returning error
eclipse-agave dev rewards: no on-chain program, auto-deposits only
next_steps: Decide path: port TRv1 features to eclipse-agave, or continue building TRv1 as L1
If eclipse-agave: port governance program, treasury withdrawal, dev rewards from TRv1
If TRv1: wire EIP-1559 into TX validation, add testnet scripts, operator docs
Rotate exposed GitHub token in trv1-chain remote
Consider archiving agave and TRv1-clean (stepping stones, not primary paths)
